close_reason: Cleared stale category filter on category-view switch in transactions page and added Playwright regression spec
description: When category filter is set in granular mode (e.g. Dining), switching Category View to coarse and applying filters sends GET /v1/transactions?category=Dining&category_view=coarse. This stale granular category is invalid for coarse mode and returns empty rows until filters are applied again after category resets to All. Repro captured in docs/transactions-tab-parity-inventory.md and output/playwright/parity/minance2-xdy.2/coarse-stale-filter.snapshot.yml. Expected: mode switch should clear/translate incompatible category before issuing coarse-mode query.
title: Transactions filter bug: stale category param when switching granular->coarse
